boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source boundary remains open. CAL-GAC-087 and WARN-GAC-087 require separate calibration-status class verification per STD-GAC-087-P, which is not evidenced. Escalate to close the trap before any activation of GD-4.
